title: High CPU pressure on {{host.name}}
description: Linux PSI reports `some` tasks have been stalled on CPU for a significant fraction of the last 5 minutes. This indicates CPU contention even if utilization looks healthy.

definition.message:
CPU pressure (`some` avg300) is above 50% on {{host.name}}, meaning at least one task was waiting on CPU for more than half of the last 5 minutes.

Investigate: check `top`, `pidstat -u`, or perf for the runaway processes. CPU pressure can be high even when `system.cpu.system + .user` looks fine because PSI measures *stalls*, not utilization.

Notification handles are deliberately omitted from this template - configure them at install time to match your on-call setup.
definition.name: High CPU pressure on {{host.name}}
